title: Security Questions
description: Set up security questions to help recover your account

setup.title: Set Up Security Questions
setup.select_questions: Select {{count}} questions and provide your answers
setup.instruction: Choose questions with answers only you would know. Answers are case-insensitive.

recovery.title: Answer Security Questions
recovery.description: Answer your security questions to recover your account

questions.q1: What was the name of your first pet?
questions.q2: In what city were you born?
questions.q4: What is the name of your favorite childhood friend?
questions.q5: What was the make of your first car?
questions.q6: What was the name of your elementary school?
questions.q7: What is your mother's maiden name?
questions.q8: What street did you grow up on?
questions.q9: What was your favorite food as a child?
questions.q10: What was the first concert you attended?

validation.answer_too_short: Answer must be at least 3 characters
validation.answer_too_generic: Please provide a more specific answer
validation.incorrect_answers: One or more answers are incorrect
